title: cyclosorus doodioides
intro: Cyclosorus doodioides, also known as the Doodia fern, is a type of fern native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of antioxidants, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Cyclosorus doodioides include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or powders, and is believed to support digestive health and boost the immune system.
